title: CTOV - Savage and Ravage Compat
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and Savage and Ravage mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Savage and Ravage. You will find some creeper sanctuaries in Pillager outposts. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**Savage and Ravage mod**

Savage and Ravage mod can be obtained from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/savage-and-ravage)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
